# Business Rules Implementation

All business rules are implemented via handlers in Freedom UI.

## Rule Types

### 1. Visibility Rule
Show/hide a field based on another field's value.

**viewConfigDiff:**
```json
{
    "operation": "merge",
    "name": "UsrReasonInput",
    "values": { "visible": "$IsReasonVisible" }
}
```

**viewModelConfigDiff:**
```javascript
"attributes": {
    "IsReasonVisible": { "value": false }
}
```

**Handler:**
```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrStatus") {
            const status = await request.$context.PDS.UsrStatus;
            request.$context.IsReasonVisible =
                status?.displayValue === "Rejected";
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

### 2. Required Rule
Make a field conditionally required.

**viewModelConfigDiff:**
```javascript
"attributes": {
    "UsrReason": {
        "modelConfig": { "path": "PDS.UsrReason" },
        "validators": {
            "required": {
                "type": "crt.Required",
                "params": { "message": "Reason is required when rejected" }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### 3. Readonly Rule
Lock a field based on condition.

**viewConfigDiff:**
```json
{
    "operation": "merge",
    "name": "UsrNameInput",
    "values": { "readonly": "$IsNameLocked" }
}
```

**Handler:**
```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelInitRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        const status = await request.$context.PDS.UsrStatus;
        request.$context.IsNameLocked =
            status?.displayValue === "Approved";
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

### 4. Filter Rule
Filter a lookup dropdown based on another field.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrCategory") {
            const category = await request.$context.PDS.UsrCategory;
            // Modify data source filter for subcategory lookup
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

### 5. Auto-Calculate
Compute a field value from other fields.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrQuantity" ||
            request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrUnitPrice") {
            const qty = await request.$context.PDS.UsrQuantity || 0;
            const price = await request.$context.PDS.UsrUnitPrice || 0;
            request.$context.PDS.UsrTotalAmount = qty * price;
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

### 6. Set Value
Set a field to a specific value when a condition is met.

```javascript
{
    request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
    handler: async (request, next) => {
        if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrType") {
            const typeVal = await request.$context.PDS.UsrType;
            if (typeVal?.displayValue === "Urgent") {
                request.$context.PDS.UsrPriority = {
                    value: "high-priority-guid",
                    displayValue: "High"
                };
            }
        }
        await next?.handle(request);
    }
}
```

## Pattern: Combining Multiple Rules

```javascript
handlers: /**SCHEMA_HANDLERS*/[
    {
        request: "crt.HandleViewModelInitRequest",
        handler: async (request, next) => {
            const status = await request.$context.PDS.UsrStatus;
            const isClosed = status?.displayValue === "Closed";
            request.$context.IsFormReadonly = isClosed;
            request.$context.IsSaveVisible = !isClosed;
            await next?.handle(request);
        }
    },
    {
        request: "crt.HandleViewModelAttributeChangeRequest",
        handler: async (request, next) => {
            if (request.attributeName === "PDS.UsrAmount") {
                const amount = await request.$context.PDS.UsrAmount || 0;
                request.$context.PDS.UsrTax = amount * 0.2;
                request.$context.PDS.UsrTotal = amount * 1.2;
                request.$context.IsHighValue = amount > 10000;
            }
            await next?.handle(request);
        }
    }
]/**SCHEMA_HANDLERS*/
```
